name: Run design review of jit-agents-spec.md
description: Spawn a fresh-context independent reviewer subagent against docs/planning/jit-agents-spec.md with the scope declared in REVIEW-001. Findings populate REVIEW-001.findings and drive DEC-0001/0002/0003 state from proposed toward decided where evidence supports it.
exit_criteria: Every finding in REVIEW-001.findings reaches a terminal state (resolved/wontfix/duplicate)
Findings that generate new decisions are linked via produces_decision
